name: configure_federated_knowledge
description: CREATE: Register new federated knowledge configuration.

consumerId.description: The unique ID of the consumer (e.g., agent) associated with the federated knowledge source.

sourceType.description: The federated knowledge source type (e.g. SharePoint, OneDrive)

hints.description: Instructions or prompt-style text to guide AI models in selecting the appropriate MCP tool.

displayName.description: The federated knowledge source display name.

name: delete_federated_knowledge
description: DELETE: Remove a federated knowledge configuration.

searchConfigurationId.description: The federated knowledge configuration unique id

consumerId.description: The unique ID of the consumer (e.g., agent) associated with the federated knowledge source.

responseTemplate: Federated knowledge configuration '{{searchConfigurationId}}' deleted for consumer '{{consumerId}}' (mock).

name: ingest_federated_knowledge
description: SYNC: Trigger (re)ingestion of a federated knowledge configuration.

consumerId.description: The unique ID of the consumer (e.g., agent) associated with the federated knowledge source.

searchConfigurationId.description: The federated knowledge configuration unique id

name: query_federated_knowledge
description: SEARCH: Query content in federated knowledge configurations.

consumerId.description: The unique ID of the consumer (e.g., agent) associated with the federated knowledge source.

summarize.description: Indicate whether the results should include summarization or not.

query.description: The query to search against the knowledge sources

searchConfigs.description: List of search config to query against

responseTemplate: Query '{{query}}' executed against federated knowledge for consumer '{{consumerId}}' (mock).

name: retrieve_federated_knowledge
description: LIST: Return all federated knowledge configurations.

consumerId.description: The unique ID of the consumer (e.g., agent) associated with the federated knowledge source.

responseTemplate: Federated knowledge configurations retrieved for consumer '{{consumerId}}' (mock).
